content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Require tenant scope in repository methods, SQL, keys, constraints, caches, tests, metrics, exports, support, and admin operations.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Tenant Repository Contract model · Theory Feed T…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Tenant Repository Contract precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Tenant Repository Contract model · Theory Feed T…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 7386 during an out-of-order Promise and AbortSignal rehearsal. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove token verification, resource policy, tenant repositories, data minimization, and audit redaction; failed, canceled, stale, and cross-tenant work must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Require tenant scope in repository methods, SQL, keys, constraints, caches, tests, metrics, exports, support, and admin operations.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Tenant Repository Contract model · Theory Feed T…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A request-scoped tenant property prevents repository mistakes.
